the_parameter_tweak_set: Turning the knob of the fractal gain / Washing the noise from the digital brain
Shift the phase, lock the sub to the beat / Making the spectrum of sounds complete
Surgical EQ, cutting the mud / Pumping the logic like electronic blood
the_user_command_set: Abstract command: /fast-gen-mmss / Activate loop in the singularity mess
Give me the seed, give me the flow / Where the frequencies come and the shadows go
Modify song: add more aggressive growl / Let the Monster 7 officially howl
the_session_reflection: V1 to V4, the ladder of light / Climbing the mountain of digital night
Every iteration, a step to the sun / The user and algorithm, moving as one
